OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Represented by Jason Banderra.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Phillips, is present.
Attorney, Jeremy Reyes, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-15-2010 is vacated.
